title: T-038 — UI: PLN-014 PO Fast-Flow Wizard modal (parity with po_fast_flow_wizard)
prompt:
Build PLN-014 PO 3-step wizard modal at `src/components/planning/po/POFastFlowWizard.tsx` matching prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning/modals.jsx:21-179` 1:1.

Steps: (1) Supplier pick + smart defaults (currency, tax_code, payment_terms, warehouse), (2) Products + qty rows with auto-fill (unit_price, expected_delivery_date, discount); warning for products without is_default supplier, (3) Review with totals + optional approval banner.

Radix Dialog (size wide). useReducer step machine. react-hook-form + Zod resolver. Submit calls T-010 Server Action.

RED RTL test asserts 3-step navigation, smart defaults populate after supplier pick, total recompute on line change.

pipeline_inputs.description: PO 3-step wizard modal with smart defaults, react-hook-form, totals derivation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/modals.jsx:21-179. Translation notes (verbatim from prototype index): window.Modal → Radix Dialog wide; useState step machine → useReducer; mock supplier options → Server Action cached supplier list; addLine/subtotal computation → derived without setState; submit setTimeout → Server Action with optimistic UI; approval banner → conditional on total > settings.po_approval_threshold; labels → next-intl planning.po. Parity checklist: (1) 3-step Stepper, (2) Step 1 fields and order (supplier, currency, tax, terms, warehouse), (3) Step 2 line table columns, (4) Step 3 review summary + approval banner, (5) Next/Back/Submit footer.
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal opens, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning/modals.jsx:21-179`, then it renders the same 3 step labels, the same field set on each step in the same order, the same Next/Back/Submit footer, and the same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Stepper, Form, Select, Input, Textarea, Button, Alert) — parity verified by RTL test per the checklist.
Given Step 1 supplier is selected, when defaults endpoint resolves, then currency/payment_terms/warehouse fields populate and become read-only by default.
Given Step 3 total > planning_settings.po_approval_threshold, when the modal renders the review, then the approval banner is visible.

Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/po/__tests__/POFastFlowWizard.test.tsx`, when run, then 0 failures. Given the UI task is closed, then CLOSEOUT includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED RTL test asserts step navigation, smart-default propagation, totals derivation, parity.
Playwright e2e: open wizard from PO list, complete all steps, expect new PO row visible.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not store totals in setState — must derive.
Do not skip Zod validation in any step.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Consumes Warehouse LP/location/GRN/TO handoff contracts; no Planning task may invent Warehouse state semantics.
Uses Settings rule registry, flags, status display, and permission contracts.
Consumes optional D365 integration adapter metadata; D365 never unlocks factory use.

ui_closeout_evidence: Playwright trace artifact for each happy path and blocked/error path exercised by the task.
Desktop screenshots/artifacts for each implemented page/modal state compared against prototype line references.
Attach artifact paths in CLOSEOUT with changed files, test commands/results, and acceptance criteria status.
